pr.title: Record: pcloadloveletter v6 — Novel Codebook+Huffman Compression + AdamW TTT (val_bpb=1.0487)

output.summary: Codebook-quantized transformer weights pass through per-tensor Huffman coding in a custom PCLL pipeline so the GQA model stays under 16MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training with AdamW test-time tuning; no validation-only training regime is used.
techniques: Per-tensor k-means codebook quantization with Huffman coding in a custom PCLL pipeline
AdamW test-time training with per-layer lr groups on top of NorMuon base
Value Residual + Gated Attention + partial RoPE + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 stack
